title: [circt-verilog] Running SROA on core dialects causes logical mismatches
body: I have noticed that enabling [the SROA pass](https://github.com/llvm/circt/blob/d1c996adc6b958b20ce25e98d95de90de2ae8613/tools/circt-verilog/circt-verilog.cpp#L338) in circt-verilog causes logical equivalence checkers to report mismatches when round-tripping Verilog through CIRCT. I'll comment that pass out again since it is not strictly necessary, but it would be good to figure out what's going on there.
